title: 'Allown #0439
definition:
Allon Bachuth = "oak of weeping"

 1) site of Deborah's (Rebekah's nurse) grave near Bethel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Allon Bachuth = "oak of weeping"

 1) site of Deborah's (Rebekah's nurse) grave near Bethel

    NASB:  oak of weeping, a tree near the grave of Rebekahs nurse
